use_cases.name: Register Organization
preconditions: User is authenticated via Enterprise SSO (SAML)
User has the applicant role
main_flow: Applicant navigates to the New Application page
System presents the organization registration form
Applicant enters organization details: name, legal entity type, year established, registration number, charitable registration number, website URL, and mailing address
Applicant enters legal representative contact: name, title, email, phone, and optional address
Applicant optionally enters a primary contact with the same fields
Applicant submits the organization registration
System validates that all required fields are present
System validates organization eligibility (BR-003: established >= 1 year)
System creates the Organization record and associated OrganizationContact records
System logs an audit entry for the organization creation
postconditions: Organization record exists with a generated organizationId
At least one OrganizationContact with contactRole = legal_representative exists
Audit entry recorded for the create action

use_cases.name: Create Funding Request
preconditions: User is authenticated and has the applicant role
User's organization is registered and meets eligibility requirements (BR-003)
main_flow: Applicant navigates to the New Application page
System pre-fills organization details from the existing Organization record
Applicant selects a request type (base-funding-renewal, new-operational-funding, expanded-services, or capital-maintenance)
Applicant enters the fiscal year, requested funding amount, proposed program name, proposed start date, and justification
If request type is Part B (new-operational-funding, expanded-services, or capital-maintenance), applicant provides community need evidence
Applicant submits the draft creation form
System validates required fields and the fiscal year format
System creates a FundingRequest record in draft status
System logs an audit entry for the funding request creation
postconditions: FundingRequest record exists in draft status
FundingRequest is linked to the applicant's organization
Audit entry recorded for the create action

use_cases.name: Submit Funding Request
preconditions: User is authenticated and has the applicant role
FundingRequest exists in draft status
All required fields are populated
Organization has a legal representative contact (BR-005)
Current date is within the submission window for the fiscal year (BR-002)
main_flow: Applicant opens the Application Detail page for a draft funding request
System displays the complete application with all sections
Applicant reviews the application and clicks Submit
System requires recent authentication for the submit action
System validates BR-001: Part B community need evidence is present if applicable
System validates BR-002: submission is within the configured submission window
System validates BR-003: organization has been established for at least one year
System validates BR-005: legal representative contact exists
System transitions the FundingRequest status from draft to submitted per BR-007
System records the submissionDate timestamp
System logs an audit entry for the status change
System sends a submission confirmation email to the applicant
postconditions: FundingRequest status is submitted
submissionDate is set to the current timestamp
Audit entry recorded for the status-change action
Applicant receives a confirmation email

use_cases.name: Assess Funding Request
preconditions: User is authenticated via Entra ID (OIDC) and has the grant-analyst role
FundingRequest is in under-review status
An Assessment record exists (or is created on first access) for the funding request
main_flow: Analyst opens the Application Detail page for an under-review funding request
System loads the funding request details, organization info, programs, budget, and documents
System loads or creates a draft Assessment record for this funding request
Analyst reviews the application materials and supporting documents
Analyst completes filter analysis responses for each filter question
If any filter response answer is 'no' or 'more-info', analyst provides required notes (BR-012)
Analyst records dimension scores: community need, organization capacity, and service gap
System computes the composite score using the weighted formula (BR-014)
Analyst writes a recommendation and additional notes
Analyst finalizes the assessment
System locks the Assessment record (status = finalized)
System transitions the FundingRequest status from under-review to evaluated per BR-007
System logs audit entries for the assessment and status change
System sends a notification to the Division manager that the assessment is ready for review
postconditions: Assessment status is finalized with a computed compositeScore
FundingRequest status is evaluated
Audit entries recorded for the assess and status-change actions
Division manager is notified via email

use_cases.name: Record Funding Decision
preconditions: User is authenticated via Entra ID (OIDC) and has grant-manager, division-leadership, or executive-office role
FundingRequest is in evaluated or recommended status
A finalized Assessment exists for the funding request
main_flow: Decision-maker opens the Application Detail page for an evaluated or recommended funding request
System loads the funding request, finalized assessment, and any prior decision records
System displays the approval chain showing which decision stages are complete
Decision-maker selects the decision type (preliminary, executive_review, or final) based on the next required stage
System validates the decision sequence: preliminary must come before executive_review, which must come before final (BR-011)
Decision-maker selects an outcome (approved, denied, deferred, or returned)
If approved, decision-maker enters the approved amount
System validates that the approved amount does not exceed the requested funding amount (BR-010)
Decision-maker enters a rationale and optional conditions
Decision-maker submits the decision
System creates a DecisionRecord
If this is the final decision and outcome is approved, system transitions FundingRequest to approved
If this is the final decision and outcome is denied, system transitions FundingRequest to denied
System logs audit entries for the decision and any status change
System sends an email notification to the applicant for final decisions
postconditions: DecisionRecord exists for the appropriate decision stage
If final approved: FundingRequest status is approved
If final denied: FundingRequest status is denied
Audit entries recorded for create and status-change actions
Applicant notified of final decisions via email

use_cases.name: View Community Needs Map
preconditions: User is authenticated via Entra ID (OIDC) and has grant-analyst, grant-manager, or division-leadership role
Community needs data has been ingested from RegionData
main_flow: Staff member navigates to the Community Map page
System loads the list of local geographic areas (LGAs) with metadata
System displays an interactive map of Cascadia LGAs
Staff member selects an LGA on the map or searches by name/region
System loads the composite community needs score for the selected LGA
System displays indicator values with privacy suppression applied for small populations (BR-015)
System substitutes zero for any missing indicator raw values (BR-016)
Staff member reviews the community needs data to inform their assessment
postconditions: Staff member has viewed the community needs data for the selected LGA
Privacy suppression has been applied for LGAs with population below 40

use_cases.name: Manage Users and Roles
preconditions: User is authenticated via Entra ID (OIDC) and has the system-admin role
main_flow: Administrator navigates to the User Management page
System loads the list of portal users with their current roles and active status
Administrator searches or filters users by role or active status
Administrator selects a user to manage
Administrator assigns a new role to the user by selecting from the available role codes
System validates that the role assignment is consistent with the audience (applicant for citizen users, staff roles for Division users)
System creates or updates the UserRole record
System logs an audit entry for the role change
postconditions: UserRole record reflects the updated role assignment
Audit entry recorded for the role-change action

use_cases.name: Upload Supporting Document
preconditions: User is authenticated and has the applicant role
FundingRequest exists in draft status
main_flow: Applicant opens the Application Detail page for a draft funding request
Applicant navigates to the documents section
Applicant selects a file to upload and specifies the document type
System validates the file type against permitted MIME types (BR-006)
System validates the file size against the maximum allowed size (BR-006)
System uploads the file to Azure Blob Storage via a pre-signed SAS URL
System creates a SupportingDocument record with virusScanStatus = pending
System initiates a virus scan on the uploaded file
When the scan completes, system updates virusScanStatus to clean or infected
If infected, the document is quarantined and cannot be downloaded
System logs an audit entry for the document upload
postconditions: SupportingDocument record exists linked to the FundingRequest
File is stored in Azure Blob Storage
Virus scan has been initiated or completed
Audit entry recorded for the upload action

use_cases.name: Withdraw Funding Request
preconditions: User is authenticated and has the applicant or a staff role
FundingRequest is in any non-terminal state (not approved, denied, or withdrawn)
main_flow: User opens the Application Detail page for a funding request
User selects the Withdraw action
System confirms the withdrawal intent with the user
System validates that the current status is not a terminal state per BR-007
System transitions the FundingRequest status to withdrawn
System logs an audit entry for the status change
postconditions: FundingRequest status is withdrawn
No further transitions are possible for this request
Audit entry recorded for the status-change action
